name: extrachill/network
description: Centralized multisite functionality for the ExtraChill Platform

scripts.test: php tests/FrontendPathResolverTest.php && php tests/FrontendPathResolverRuntimeTest.php && php tests/AdPolicyTest.php && php tests/NetworkBridgeComposerFallbackTest.php && php tests/ArtistTermBindingDeletionTest.php && php tests/ExperimentAssignmentTest.php && php tests/ExperimentAdminPermissionCliProbe.php && node tests/ExperimentAssignmentJsTest.js && node tests/BridgeInstrumentationJsTest.js
scripts.lint:php: phpcs --standard=WordPress --exclude=WordPress.Files.FileName inc/core/frontend-path-resolver.php inc/core/ad-policy.php inc/core/experiments.php inc/integrations/ad-delivery.php inc/integrations/member-ad-benefit.php inc/integrations/artist-term-binding-deletion.php inc/Abilities/AdPolicyAbility.php inc/Abilities/ExperimentAssignmentAbility.php admin/network-ad-settings.php tests/ExperimentAssignmentTest.php tests/ExperimentAdminPermissionCliProbe.php && php -l tests/FrontendPathResolverTest.php && php -l tests/FrontendPathResolverRuntimeProbe.php && php -l tests/FrontendPathResolverRuntimeTest.php && php -l tests/FrontendPathResolverTransportProbe.php && php -l tests/AdPolicyTest.php && php -l tests/ArtistTermBindingDeletionTest.php && php -l tests/ExperimentAssignmentTest.php && php -l tests/ExperimentAdminPermissionCliProbe.php && node --check assets/js/experiment-assignment.js && node --check tests/ExperimentAssignmentJsTest.js
